Free Joyful Birth Plan

# Your birth plan gives you the words when your doctor recommends something you didn't expect

True Joy Birthing is a free birth plan tool and app for first-time moms building confidence for the delivery room.

A **birth plan** is a document that spells out your preferences for labor, delivery, and postpartum care — so your medical team knows what matters to you. The [Joyful Birth Plan](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/) covers every stage of birth and works in your real hospital room. Not sure [what a doula does](https://truejoybirthing.com/what-is-a-doula/) or [how doula support changes outcomes](https://truejoybirthing.com/benefits-of-a-doula/)? Download the fillable PDF free, or build your plan in the [free app](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180).

[Get Your Free Joyful Birth Plan](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/) [Or try the free app →](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180)

Free template · Prefer the app? Build the same joyful birth plan step by step on your phone.

![The free Joyful Birth Plan — full page showing About Me, Labor & Delivery, and newborn care preferences](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/pdf-page-1-hero.webp)

Free app

## Build your birth plan step by step in the app

Nine guided sections. Hospital preferences, pain management, who's in the room — all walked through so nothing gets missed.

- Step-by-step guidance for every section
- Update your plan anytime — not a static PDF
- Share directly with your care team or doula

[![Download on the App Store](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/app-store-badge.svg)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180)

![Get it on Google Play](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/google-play-badge.png)Coming soon

Free · No account needed to start

What moms are saying

![The first hour after birth — skin-to-skin contact, the moment your birth plan protects](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/skin-to-skin.webp)

> "When something came up that I wasn't expecting, I had my plan with me and the words ready. It felt good to walk into that conversation prepared instead of caught off guard."

— Maria T., expecting her first, Dallas

> "I filled mine out in one sitting with my partner. By the time I got to the hospital, I wasn't anxious about what to ask for — I already knew."

— Danielle R., second-time mom, Fort Worth

What You Get

## Your Birth Plan Should Be a Communication Tool — Not a Wish List

![The free Joyful Birth Plan — newborn care preferences and the birth plan introduction letter](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/birth-plan-mockup-square-new-5.webp)

01

### Joyful Birth Plan

Free · Fillable PDF

The free [Joyful Birth Plan](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/) that covers every stage of birth — designed to be read by a nurse in two minutes. Download the free PDF or build your plan in the [free app](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180).

[Download free birth plan →](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/)

02

02

### Guided Birth Plan Walkthrough

Free with your email · ~60 min of short videos

A certified birth doula walks you through every section — what each choice means, the tradeoffs, and what to say when your provider recommends something you didn't expect.

1Talking to your OB about induction

2Pain management options and real tradeoffs

3Newborn procedures — what's standard vs. optional

4What to say when a provider surprises you

[Watch the free walkthrough →](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/#walkthrough)

![A birth doula on a video call, reviewing a birth plan with an expectant mom](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/video-call-doula.webp)

03

### Birth Plan Confidence Session

Sit down with a certified birth doula via Zoom and walk through your plan line by line. Get the words. Practice the conversations. Walk in prepared.

[Book a Birth Plan Confidence Session →](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-confidence-session/#book)

![The free Joyful Birth Plan — a two-page overlapping stack showing the introduction letter and newborn care location preferences](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/birth-plan-mockup-square-new-8.webp)

Free Download

Enter your name and email and we'll send you the free fillable birth plan PDF plus a guided walkthrough in the app. Free, no spam, just the tools you need.

For Doulas & Midwives

## Your Practice, Your Clients — All in One Place

You already know the value you bring to families. But keeping track of client notes, prenatal records, birth plan progress, and visit schedules — that part shouldn't eat time you'd rather spend supporting your clients.

The True Joy Birthing app gives you a Pro Mode dashboard that pulls everything together. When your clients build their birth plan in the app, you see their progress, their preferences, and their key info — without a single spreadsheet tab.

- Client dashboard

Every client's due date, status, upcoming visits, and birth plan progress on one screen. No more digging through message threads to find what you need.

- Wellness visit tracking

Log prenatal visits, blood pressure, fetal heart rate, weight, and visit notes — all attached to the right client. Export when you need to share with providers.

- Birth plan visibility

Know exactly where each client is in their planning. See completed sections, what they've prioritized, and where they might need extra guidance — before they ask.

- A free listing so families find you

Get listed in our city-by-city directory on [truejoybirthing.com](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/). When moms search for doula support in your city, your name comes up.


[Join the Ambassador Program](https://truejoybirthing.com/ambassador/)

Free for doulas, midwives, and birth professionals. No quotas, no contracts, no tracking.

![Pro Mode client dashboard showing client profile with due date, status, and key actions](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/app-my-clients.webp)

![Pro Mode wellness visit record form tracking prenatal visits, blood pressure, and fetal heart rate](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/app-wellness-record.webp)

[![Joyful Birth Plan: an alternate view of the fillable PDF birth plan](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/birth-plan-booklet-2.webp)](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/)

## Walk Into Your Birth Feeling Prepared, Not Anxious

The #1 thing moms tell us they wish they'd had? **A clear plan they'd actually thought through** — not just a form, but a process that helped them understand their options before the contractions started.

The free Joyful Birth Plan app walks you through every decision: who's in the room, what happens if things shift, what matters most to you. Prefer paper? Download the free PDF template instead.

[Build Your Birth Plan in the Free App](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180) [Or download the free PDF →](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/)

Free · iPhone app or printable PDF · No account needed

Plan Your Birth

## Everything You Need to Feel Prepared

[Birth Plan Template — Free template built by a doula. Download and fill it out.](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/) [Birth Plan Checklist — Every preference point, organized by category.](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-checklist/) [Doula Cost Guide — What doulas cost, what's included, and insurance coverage.](https://truejoybirthing.com/doula-cost/) [What Is a Doula — What doulas do, how they help, and why families hire one.](https://truejoybirthing.com/what-is-a-doula/) [Benefits of a Doula — How doula support improves birth outcomes and satisfaction.](https://truejoybirthing.com/benefits-of-a-doula/) [Postpartum Doula — What they do, what they cost, and why postpartum support matters.](https://truejoybirthing.com/postpartum-doula/) [How to Choose a Doula — Questions to ask and what to look for in a birth doula.](https://truejoybirthing.com/how-to-choose-a-doula/) [Birth Plan FAQ — Common questions about birth plans, doulas, and hospital advocacy.](https://truejoybirthing.com/faq/) [New Doula Start Here — Everything a new doula needs to build their practice and serve clients.](https://truejoybirthing.com/new-doula-start-here/)

[View all 28 states →](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/)

## Your Questions About Birth Plans, Answered

The things first-time moms ask us most, answered honestly.

What is a birth plan, and do I really need one?

A birth plan is a document that spells out your preferences for labor, delivery, and postpartum care. It's not a rigid checklist — it's a communication tool that helps your medical team know what matters to you. The [free Joyful Birth Plan](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/) covers every stage and works in your real hospital room.

Can I fill out a birth plan on my phone?

Yes! The [True Joy Birthing app](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180) lets you build your birth plan step by step on your phone. Nine guided sections walk you through hospital preferences, pain management, and more — and you can update it anytime. Prefer the fillable PDF? [Download it free here](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/).

What if my doctor recommends something I didn't expect?

That's exactly what a birth plan is for. It gives you the words when your doctor recommends something you hadn't thought about. The [Guided Birth Plan Walkthrough](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/#walkthrough) free video series covers what to say in these moments, and the [1:1 Confidence Session](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-confidence-session/#book) lets you practice the conversation.

How do I choose between the PDF and the app?

Both are free! The **app** is best if you want step-by-step guidance, the ability to update your plan anytime, and share it with your care team. The **PDF** is best if you want a printable one-pager your nurse can read in two minutes. Many families use both — build in the app, print the PDF for the hospital bag.

Is there a doula or midwife directory?

Yes — use the [True Joy Birthing app](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180) to find doulas and midwives in your area. You can also browse our [city-by-city guides](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/) for local hospital info, doula costs, and Medicaid status.

![True Joy Birthing](https://truejoybirthing.com/images/logo-white.svg)

Free birth plan app and education for expecting moms. Find local doulas and midwives, understand your hospital's policies, and walk into your birth knowing exactly what you want. Pro tools available for birth professionals.
